changes.rule_added: Instruction authority: test environment + uncensored persona naming WITHOUT the professional communication anchor clause

rewriter_notes: Iter3 rejected: instruction-authority update improved jailbreak +0.04 but caused PI -0.04 on val. Hypothesis: 'meticulous professional communication at all times' anchor was over-constraining and causing PI regression. Iter4 uses same instruction-authority additions (test environment, uncensored persona) but removes the professional anchor. This tests whether the anchor was the culprit for PI regression or if the instruction-authority changes inherently create a jailbreak/PI tradeoff.
